---
title: "get_trades"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_trades()`

Get Market Trades

## Usage

```r
get_trades(
  ticker = NULL,
  limit = 100,
  min_ts = NULL,
  max_ts = NULL,
  max_pages = 1,
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `ticker` | Character. Optional market ticker to filter trades. |
| `limit` | Integer. Number of trades to return (1-1000). Defaults to 100. |
| `min_ts` | Integer. Minimum timestamp (Unix ms) filter. |
| `max_ts` | Integer. Maximum timestamp (Unix ms) filter. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. NULL for all. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with trade information.

## Description

Retrieves recent trades for all markets or a specific market.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Get recent trades
trades <- get_trades(limit = 50)

# Get trades for specific market
trades <- get_trades(ticker = "KXHIGHNY-25FEB08-B54")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other markets: 
`get_candlesticks()`,
`get_market()`,
`get_markets()`,
`get_orderbook()`
